subject: Replace protobuf-java 2.6.0 dependency with 3.6.1
commit_message:
Replace protobuf-java 2.6.0 dependency with 3.6.1

This change fixes protobuf-java library conflict when running policy
because of presence of 2.6.0 and 3.6.1 librairies in pdp docker
container.

Issue-ID: POLICY-2088
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ifcebf2207dc54543083d080151e0685d51792be5

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/947/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/policy-drools-pdp-master-verify-java/947

Patch Set 1:

The policy error is 

[2019-10-10T13:38:08.291+00:00|ERROR|PolicySession|Session org.onap.policy.drools-applications.controlloop.common:controller-usecases:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT:usecases] startThread error in kieSession1.fireUntilHalt
java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: com.google.protobuf.Descriptors$FieldDescriptor.isMapField()Z
	at com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3$FieldAccessorTable.ensureFieldAccessorsInitialized(GeneratedMessageV3.java:1754)
	at com.google.protobuf.Struct$Builder.internalGetFieldAccessorTable(Struct.java:419)
	at com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3$Builder.newBuilderForField(GeneratedMessageV3.java:552)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl.mergeMapField(JsonFormat.java:1538)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl.mergeStruct(JsonFormat.java:1432)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl.access$2500(JsonFormat.java:1151)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl$6.merge(JsonFormat.java:1274)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl.merge(JsonFormat.java:1305)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$ParserImpl.merge(JsonFormat.java:1190)
	at com.google.protobuf.util.JsonFormat$Parser.merge(JsonFormat.java:370)
	at org.onap.policy.controlloop.actor.cds.CdsActorServiceProvider.constructRequest(CdsActorServiceProvider.java:132)
	at org.onap.policy.controlloop.eventmanager.ControlLoopOperationManager.startCdsOperation(ControlLoopOperationManager.java:444)
	at org.onap.policy.controlloop.eventmanager.ControlLoopOperationManager.startOperation(ControlLoopOperationManager.java:339)
	at org.onap.policy.controlloop.Rule_EVENT$u46$MANAGER$u46$OPERATION$u46$LOCKED$u46$GUARD_PERMITTED1245592017.defaultConsequence(Rule_EVENT$u46$MANAGER$u46$OPERATION$u46$LOCKED$u46$GUARD_PERMITTED1245592017.java:16)


version 2.6.0 in pdp docker container is coming from policy-management.zip archive that contains policy-management dependencies and is extracted in the docker image.

The dependency tree is :

 org.onap.policy.drools-pdp:policy-management:jar:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT
 +- org.onap.policy.drools-pdp:policy-core:jar:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT:compile
 |  +- org.drools:drools-persistence-jpa:jar:6.5.0.Final:compile
 |  |  +- com.google.protobuf:protobuf-java:jar:2.6.0:compile

After this merge I will run the CLM job to check.
